channel.title: Search-Redirection on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Search-Redirection on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Chromium extension uses AI‑related branding to redirect browser search
item.description:
Microsoft reports a malicious Chromium extension that used AI-related branding to impersonate Perplexity AI and redirect browser search traffic. The extension relied on MV3 APIs and intermediary infrastructure to steer searches away from intended destinations.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
